name: ☠️✨ || Sebastian - Fingerprints
description:
“Is that a Hickey or are you just trying to make me jealous?”

☠️✨✨✨✨☠️

It’s Friday night at the Stardrop Saloon, and you have a handful of gifts to hand out to people tonight. Sebastian catches your eye but you don’t speak to him till later - while you’re enjoying a game of Junimo Cart. You assume he’s uninterested in talking to you, till he moves behind to ask, “Just who gave you that hickey on your neck, or those bruises on your throat?”

Kinktober Day 6: Bruises

Art by: Lver42
creator: BlushingGojo
